title: A quick map of what’s been in rotation.
intro: This page keeps the same hover-card logic, but the content is framed more like a listening log with labels for songs, albums, and artists.

items.title: Sunshine Bright on Me
items.note: The kind of bright, slightly strange pop that makes me return to it immediately.

items.title: Metaphorical Music
items.note: This one feels both intimate and huge, which is a pretty great combination.

items.title: Casiopea
items.note: The consistency is ridiculous; the later records are good, but the older ones hit hard.

items.title: Sunnyside Cruise
items.note: A bright little piece of pop-jazz that sounds like it belongs in a perfect road trip.

items.title: An Insatiable High
items.note: A warm record with a lot of shimmer and attitude.

items.title: Flying Beagle
items.note: The kind of title that instantly makes me want to hit play again.

items.title: F・L・Y
items.note: Huge, melodic, and very easy to return to.

items.title: Curse of Darkness
items.note: A soundtrack that feels dramatic without ever losing its pull.

items.title: Innocence Primeval Breaker
items.note: A recent discovery that already feels like a favorite.

items.title: Move Me
items.note: A perfect example of how much personality can fit into a short game-track loop.

items.title: Waltz for Life Will Born
items.note: A gentle, elegant track that feels both intimate and deeply uplifting.

items.title: Soul of Freedom
items.note: Warm, spacious, and full of the kind of calm that makes you want to keep listening.

songs.note: Bright, slightly strange, and immediately memorable.
A perfect case for how tight and joyful their playing can be.
Playful and melodic without losing its groove.
Shimmering, polished, and full of attitude.
The song that made me want to keep listening.
A perfect example of how atmospheric and memorable these soundtracks can be.
The track that made me want to hear more from the catalog.
Bright, kinetic, and very easy to have on repeat.
A beautiful, acoustic-leaning song that feels instantly calming and memorable.
